lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: What can I do for you, traveller?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll have a pint.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: That'll be 4 gold pieces.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have enough coin.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: I can't just be handing out free beers...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Couldn't I just take one off those tables?

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: ...I suppose, if that's the kind of person you are.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Bast.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: Sorry, you don't seem to have room to hold it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oops!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: My pub's called The Legless Faun. It's where all the newcomers find themselves after the long voyage from the east. A good drink takes the edge off, y'know? So, fancy a pint?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you heard any rumours here?

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: Apparently Veos is looking for some help with something. He hangs around the docks of Port Piscarilius.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: They say there's trouble in Port Piscarilius. Something about gangs uniting. Might be worth looking into.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: I hear that Lord Hosidius has misplaced one of his sons. The Hosidius family might pay a lot to see him returned safely.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: Phileas Rimor has supposedly been looking for some assistance with something in Shayzien. Maybe worth investigating.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: I hear that the rulers of Lovakengj have some work available. You'll find them in the Lovakengj Assembly.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: Apparently there's been some commotion in the middle of Arceuus. Might be worth checking out.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: That protest outside Kourend Castle is starting to attract some attention. Could be worth taking a look.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: No, it hasn't been very busy lately.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I get something to eat?

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: Sure, we sell stew made at The Golden Field pub for 25 gold pieces.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: Would you like a bowl?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please, sounds great.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: Are you sure you have enough money?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... You're right, I don't have enough money.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: That's ok, come back when you have enough money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Bast.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: Sorry, you don't seem to have room to hold it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oops!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: Suit yourself. More delicious stew for everyone else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid not as I've something to attend to.

lines.speaker: Bast
lines.text: A wise man once told me to never fear a drink... But perhaps I'm a little bias.
